Dear Ms. Stone:
I am writing to ask for a written ruling on a possible conflict
of interest that we discussed last week.
The original development project for the new City of Iemecula was
owned by Kaiser Development. They iu tern sold the Land to
Bedford Properties, who have a joint arrangement with KemPer Real
Estate Maaagement Company. Recently Kemper ReaI Estate Management
Company took exclusive controL of the remaining unsold and
undeveJ.opecl land, as well as some retail centers.
I am running for the city council of the City of Temecula and own
Kemper Financial mutual funds. Additionally I control such funds
in an irrevocable trust 
fund for my mother, Martha Adams a
resident of West PaIm Beach, Florida.
I wish to determine whether there would be a conflict, 
should I
be eJ,ected, and had to vote on land use by Xemper ReaI Estate
ManagemeDt Company .
Thank you for your heIp. Should you need to ask me any further
questions please call me at 774-599-4206.
